caption: In a large, brightly lit indoor venue with beige walls and recessed ceiling lights, a man performs a martial arts demonstration on a blue carpeted floor. He is dressed in a blue long-sleeved traditional outfit with matching trousers. In the background, a crowd of people in formal and semi-formal attire sit at tables, observing the performance. The man begins by standing and swinging a long staff with a red tassel at the end. He then transitions into a deep, wide stance, extending the staff horizontally across his body. As the sequence progresses, he shifts his weight and pivots his body, maintaining the low stance while continuing to maneuver the staff. The scene remains consistent in location and lighting, focusing on the man's fluid movements and the attentive audience watching from the perimeter of the performance area.
